positive: A set of cute, kawaii-style anthropomorphic animal characters (fox, bunny, bear) engaged in a picnic. Pastel color palette, thick outlines, sticker sheet style, children's book illustration, joyful, whimsical, flat vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, realistic fur, grunge, messy lines
